text:
# From Legacy to Legendary Accelerating software delivery in modernization projects at Nationwide Building Society  
14  
|                                                             |    | Requirements                                                                                                                                                   | Design    &    Coding                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Unit Testing                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|-------------------------------------------------------------|----|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Mobile Banking App Modernization Legacy Sencha App Codebase |    | Reverse engineered to extract business requirements  ~25% reduction from manual code analysis and 80%+ accurate requirement extraction from legacy Sencha code | Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated  Generated Kotlin, Swift code & React, APIs and logic rapidly with adaptive suggestions  30% faster UI development  Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process from development process   10% better code quality | Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases  15% faster test cycles  Increased unit test automation resulted in ~30% reduction in testing defects (demonstrated in React) |
| Internet Banking Modernization Figma Designs to React Code  |    | N.A.                                                                                                                                                           | Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated  Generated Kotlin, Swift code & React, APIs and logic rapidly with adaptive suggestions  30% faster UI development  Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process from development process   10% better code quality | Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases  15% faster test cycles  Increased unit test automation resulted in ~30% reduction in testing defects (demonstrated in React) |
| Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration    |    | Reverse engineer Teradata Stored Procedures to understand the logic                                                                                            | Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails 40% reduction in coding effort                                                                                                                                                                                                 |                                                                                                                                                                                              |  
Using IBM Science of Consulting  
icon  
icon  
icon  
icon  
The Nationwide delivery team is on a continuous journey of innovation. Taking on the challenge of productivity by bringing together the knowledge of the client context, and client provided GenAI tools – our teams were able to demonstrate quantitative benefits from live modernization enagements  
# From Legacy to Legendary Accelerating software delivery in modernization projects at Nationwide Building Society  
15  
Using IBM Science of Consulting  
Legacy Sencha App Codebase  
- Reverse engineered to extract business requirements
- Rebuilt in Java, Native, Swift & Kotlin via Copilot  
logo  
Accelerated development with Figma designs  
- Generated production ready code in React, Kotlin & Swift
- Co-Pilot provided with Client Design guideline files and precise specification and context for high quality code output  
icon  
Use of gen AI revealed hidden areas of inefficiency in SDLC  
- Prompted rethinking of processes
- Identified potential for Agentic AI integration  
logo  
Estimation models updated to deliver promised efficiency  
- Gen AI efficiencies are now getting baked in
- Sprint Planning is getting faster and smarter  
icon  
Clients want predictable outcomes & results  
Ran multiple POCs to seek, absorb and push Gen AI Limits  
- Careful Prompt -> Context Engineering, iterated over 2 months
- Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds  
logo  
Evidence driven,  
quick iterations  
Collaborated deeply with client stakeholders  
- Tech Architects
- Product Owners
- Code Owners
- Brought them along the learning curve  
icon  
Open Collaboration  
Client challenge  
- Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%
- Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise of existing apps, applied it with newly acquired GenAI tooling knowledge to take on challenge

name: Chunk 14/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide Building Society
raw_entities.description: A major UK financial services institution undergoing comprehensive digital and data platform modernization. The client is actively leveraging GenAI tools alongside internal expertise to accelerate software delivery, reduce project timelines, and improve code quality across mobile and internet banking platforms.
context: Accelerating software delivery in modernization projects at Nationwide Building Society
The Nationwide delivery team is on a continuous journey of innovation.
Client challenge - Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%

raw_entities.name: IBM Science of Consulting
raw_entities.description: A structured consulting and delivery methodology that integrates deep client context with generative AI tools to drive innovation and deliver quantifiable efficiency gains. It serves as the foundational framework guiding the modernization engagements and stakeholder collaboration.
context: Using IBM Science of Consulting
Taking on the challenge of productivity by bringing together the knowledge of the client context, and client provided GenAI tools
our teams were able to demonstrate quantitative benefits from live modernization enagements

raw_entities.name: Mobile Banking App Modernization
raw_entities.description: A targeted software modernization engagement focused on migrating and rebuilding the client's legacy mobile banking application. The project leverages reverse engineering and AI-assisted code generation to transition from Sencha to modern native and cross-platform frameworks.
context: Mobile Banking App Modernization Legacy Sencha App Codebase
Reverse engineered to extract business requirements
Rebuilt in Java, Native, Swift & Kotlin via Copilot

raw_entities.name: Internet Banking Modernization
raw_entities.description: A digital transformation initiative aimed at modernizing the client's internet banking platform. The solution focuses on converting Figma design files into production-ready React, Kotlin, and Swift code using automated generation and adaptive AI suggestions.
context: Internet Banking Modernization Figma Designs to React Code
Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated
Generated production ready code in React, Kotlin & Swift

raw_entities.name: Teradata to Databricks Migration
raw_entities.description: A data platform modernization project focused on migrating legacy Teradata stored procedures and logic to a modern Databricks ecosystem. The engagement utilizes automated reverse engineering and dbt code generation to reduce manual coding effort and align with client guardrails.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration
Reverse engineer Teradata Stored Procedures to understand the logic
Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails

raw_entities.name: Legacy Code Reverse Engineering
raw_entities.description: The ability to systematically analyze and deconstruct legacy application codebases to extract underlying business logic and requirements. This capability replaces manual code analysis with automated extraction, significantly improving accuracy and speed.
context: Reverse engineered to extract business requirements ~25% reduction from manual code analysis
80%+ accurate requirement extraction from legacy Sencha code
Reverse engineer Teradata Stored Procedures to understand the logic

raw_entities.name: Automated Code Refactoring
raw_entities.description: The use of generative AI to automatically refactor legacy code into modern, production-ready formats. This capability eliminates low-skill manual processes, accelerates UI development, and improves overall code quality through automated suggestions and logic generation.
context: Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process from development process
Generated Kotlin, Swift code & React, APIs and logic rapidly with adaptive suggestions
30% faster UI development

raw_entities.name: AI-Driven Test Case Generation
raw_entities.description: The capability to automatically generate comprehensive unit and component test cases, including simulated edge cases. This accelerates testing cycles and significantly reduces defect rates by increasing automation coverage across the development lifecycle.
context: Autogenerated Unit/Component Test cases & simulated edge cases
15% faster test cycles
Increased unit test automation resulted in ~30% reduction in testing defects

raw_entities.name: Prompt & Context Engineering
raw_entities.description: The specialized skill of crafting, iterating, and refining prompts to maximize generative AI tool performance. This capability involves identifying tool limitations and building custom utilities or workarounds to ensure consistent, high-quality code output.
context: Careful Prompt -> Context Engineering, iterated over 2 months
Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds
Co-Pilot provided with Client Design guideline files and precise specification

raw_entities.name: Software Delivery Acceleration
raw_entities.description: The application of generative AI and modern development practices to speed up the end-to-end software development lifecycle. This use case focuses on reducing manual bottlenecks, accelerating UI and backend development, and improving overall project velocity.
context: Accelerating software delivery in modernization projects
Use of gen AI revealed hidden areas of inefficiency in SDLC
Prompted rethinking of processes

raw_entities.name: Agile Planning Optimization
raw_entities.description: The integration of AI-driven efficiency gains into recurring agile planning cycles. This use case focuses on updating estimation models and leveraging faster, smarter sprint planning to deliver predictable outcomes and meet client efficiency targets.
context: Estimation models updated to deliver promised efficiency
Sprint Planning is getting faster and smarter
Clients want predictable outcomes & results

raw_entities.name: 25% Reduction in Manual Code Analysis
raw_entities.description: A quantifiable time and resource saving achieved by automating the extraction of business requirements from legacy codebases. This benefit directly reduces the manual effort previously required for reverse engineering and requirement gathering.
context: ~25% reduction from manual code analysis and 80%+ accurate requirement extraction from legacy Sencha code
Reverse engineered to extract business requirements

raw_entities.name: 30% Faster UI Development
raw_entities.description: A significant acceleration in frontend development cycles enabled by automated code generation from design files. This benefit allows teams to rapidly produce production-ready React, Kotlin, and Swift components.
context: 30% faster UI development
Generated production ready code in React, Kotlin & Swift
Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated

raw_entities.name: 40% Reduction in Coding Effort
raw_entities.description: A substantial decrease in developer hours and manual coding required for generating data transformation code and platform logic. This benefit directly addresses client productivity challenges by automating complex code generation tasks.
context: 40% reduction in coding effort
Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails
Taking on the challenge of productivity

raw_entities.name: 30-40% Project Time Reduction
raw_entities.description: The overarching client goal and achieved outcome of significantly shortening the duration of modernization projects. This benefit represents the primary efficiency target driving the adoption of GenAI tooling and process rethinking.
context: Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%
Client challenge - Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%
Accelerated development with Figma designs

raw_entities.name: Legacy System Constraints
raw_entities.description: The technical debt and operational friction caused by outdated codebases and manual development processes. These constraints slow down delivery, increase defect rates, and require significant effort to reverse engineer and modernize.
context: Legacy Sencha App Codebase
Automated code refactoring for has removed a low skills, manual process from development process
Reverse engineered to extract business requirements

raw_entities.name: Productivity & Efficiency Pressure
raw_entities.description: The client's need to accelerate delivery timelines and improve output quality amid growing software demands. This pressure drives the adoption of GenAI tools and the rethinking of traditional SDLC processes to meet aggressive modernization targets.
context: Taking on the challenge of productivity
Clients want predictable outcomes & results
Reduce time taken for modernizing projects by 30-40%

raw_entities.name: Skill Gap & Manual Process Dependency
raw_entities.description: Reliance on low-skill manual processes and heavy dependency on individual expert knowledge that slows down development. This challenge is addressed by automating tasks and upskilling teams through collaborative learning and AI integration.
context: removed a low skills, manual process from development process
Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise of existing apps, applied it with newly acquired GenAI tooling knowledge
Brought them along the learning curve

raw_entities.name: IBM Copilot
raw_entities.description: A generative AI coding assistant used to generate production-ready code, provide adaptive suggestions, and accelerate development workflows. The platform is integrated with client design guidelines and specification files to ensure high-quality output.
context: Rebuilt in Java, Native, Swift & Kotlin via Copilot
Co-Pilot provided with Client Design guideline files and precise specification
Discovered Copilot limitations, and built utilities for workarounds

raw_entities.name: Figma
raw_entities.description: A design and prototyping tool used as the primary source of truth for generating native and React code components. The platform's designs are directly fed into AI tools to automate frontend development and reduce manual translation effort.
context: Figma  Native, React code / components auto generated
Accelerated development with Figma designs
Internet Banking Modernization Figma Designs to React Code

raw_entities.name: Teradata
raw_entities.description: The client's legacy data warehousing platform containing stored procedures that require modernization. The system represents the technical debt targeted for migration to a modern cloud-native data ecosystem.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration
Reverse engineer Teradata Stored Procedures to understand the logic
Legacy Sencha App Codebase

raw_entities.name: Databricks
raw_entities.description: The modern data and AI platform targeted for migration, serving as the new foundation for the client's data platform. The engagement focuses on generating dbt code and aligning data transformations with client frameworks and guardrails.
context: Modernize Data Platform Teradata to Databricks Migration
Generate dbt code based on client frameworks, standards and guardrails
Teradata to Databricks Migration

raw_entities.name: Evidence-Driven Quick Iterations
raw_entities.description: A collaborative, agile approach that leverages rapid prototyping and continuous feedback to validate AI capabilities and drive adoption. This model emphasizes running multiple POCs to push tool limits, identify limitations, and build custom workarounds.
context: Evidence driven, quick iterations
Ran multiple POCs to seek, absorb and push Gen AI Limits
Careful Prompt -> Context Engineering, iterated over 2 months

raw_entities.name: Deep Client Collaboration
raw_entities.description: A co-creation methodology involving close, ongoing work with client stakeholders to navigate learning curves and align on outcomes. This approach brings technical and product leaders along the learning curve to ensure successful AI integration.
context: Open Collaboration
Collaborated deeply with client stakeholders
Brought them along the learning curve
Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise

raw_entities.name: Quantitative Benefit Demonstration
raw_entities.description: The ability to deliver and prove measurable efficiency gains and performance improvements through live modernization engagements. This differentiator highlights the shift from theoretical AI promises to documented, quantifiable outcomes in production environments.
context: our teams were able to demonstrate quantitative benefits from live modernization enagements
Estimation models updated to deliver promised efficiency
Clients want predictable outcomes & results

raw_entities.name: Tech Architects
raw_entities.description: Client-side technical leaders involved in the modernization process, providing deep expertise on existing applications and guiding architectural decisions. They collaborate closely with the delivery team to validate AI-generated code and ensure system integrity.
context: Tech Architects
Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise of existing apps
Collaborated deeply with client stakeholders

raw_entities.name: Product Owners
raw_entities.description: Client-side business and product leaders responsible for defining requirements, validating delivery outcomes, and ensuring alignment with strategic goals. They work alongside technical teams to prioritize modernization efforts and measure efficiency gains.
context: Product Owners
Collaborated deeply with client stakeholders
Clients want predictable outcomes & results

raw_entities.name: Code Owners
raw_entities.description: Client-side development personnel responsible for maintaining and understanding the application codebase. They play a key role in validating AI-generated code, applying newly acquired GenAI tooling knowledge, and ensuring smooth handover of modernized components.
context: Code Owners
Collaborated deeply with client stakeholders
Architects, Developers, Testers utilized their expertise

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The primary technology and consulting firm delivering the modernization solutions and AI capabilities to the client. IBM leverages its Science of Consulting framework and expert squads to drive innovation, integrate GenAI tools, and deliver quantifiable efficiency improvements.
context: Using IBM Science of Consulting
The Nationwide delivery team is on a continuous journey of innovation.
Experts across squads

raw_entities.description: Iterative testing and validation phases conducted to explore generative AI capabilities, identify tool limitations, and develop custom workarounds. These POCs served as the foundation for refining prompt engineering and establishing reliable delivery patterns.
context: Ran multiple POCs to seek, absorb and push Gen AI Limits

raw_entities.description: The recurring agile planning event where GenAI efficiencies are now integrated to improve speed, accuracy, and predictability. This event has been optimized through updated estimation models and the adoption of faster, smarter planning practices.
